title: Slippery Eel Casino
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Slippery Eel Casino''' was a [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] establishment. The [[Casino/Legends|casino]] ran an illegal supply operation, where [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] transferred [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for illicit goods through a [[Trin sticks]] game bossed by a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2003-08-XX -->''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''
